item.title: 109% Return in One Year, 103% Profit Growth: What Drives AXISCADES Technologies Ltd’s Multibagger Rally?
item.description: A 109.13% stock return in one year. A 103.1% growth in net profit over the same period. The gap between those two numbers is relatively narrow, indicating that earnings growth has been a significant driver of AXISCADES Technologies Ltd's rally. Yet, the stock trades at a P/E multiple nearly three times the industry average, raising questions about valuation sustainability. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Datiware Maritime Infra Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 24.96
item.description: Surging to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 24.96 on 13 Apr 2026, Datiware Maritime Infra Ltd has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, outperforming its sector and the broader market despite a challenging environment. This milestone caps a 54.65% rally over the past year, significantly outpacing the Sensex’s modest 2.25% gain. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Paisalo Digital Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Paisalo Digital Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 13 Jun 2026. Yet, the stock slipped 0.66% on the day, and while weekly and monthly technical indicators lean bullish, the mixed signals warrant a closer look at the reliability of this crossover. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Ltd. Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Ltd. has crossed above the 200-day moving average, creating a golden cross on 13 Apr 2026. While this technical event often signals a shift towards bullish momentum, the broader technical and fundamental context presents a more nuanced picture that warrants careful analysis. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Kemp & Co Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 868.3 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline has pushed Kemp & Co Ltd to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 868.3 on 13 Apr 2026, marking a significant 44.4% drop from its 52-week high of Rs 1,559.95. This latest fall comes amid a broader market downturn but stands out due to the stock’s persistent underperformance and fundamental weaknesses. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Manraj Housing Finance Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 41.81 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: Manraj Housing Finance Ltd’s stock price declined sharply on 13 Apr 2026, hitting a new 52-week low of Rs.41.81. This marks a significant downturn for the housing finance company, reflecting ongoing pressures in its financial performance and market positioning. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Muthoot Microfin Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Muthoot Microfin Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness in the near future. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Triton Valves Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Triton Valves Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Auto Components & Equipments sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raises concerns about its long-term weakness amid already challenging market conditions. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Quality Power Electrical Equipments Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Quality Power Electrical Equipments Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 13 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical and fundamental landscape presents a nuanced picture, with some indicators supporting the crossover while others remain inconclusive or absent. This divergence invites a closer examination of the signal’s reliability in the context of recent price action and company fundamentals. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do Inox India Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Inox India Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 13 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical landscape presents a nuanced picture, with some monthly indicators bearish despite strong weekly momentum. This divergence invites a closer examination of the signal's reliability. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in United Foodbrands Ltd — On a Day the Stock Rose 5.24%. What the Mixed Signals Mean
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for United Foodbrands Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 13 Apr 2026. Yet, this technical event arrives amid a complex backdrop of mixed momentum and fundamental challenges, raising questions about the signal's reliability. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Biocon Ltd. Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Biocon Ltd., a prominent player in the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-DMA. This technical development is widely regarded as a bearish signal, indicating a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raising concerns about long-term weakness amid a challenging market backdrop. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do AXISCADES Technologies Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for AXISCADES Technologies Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 13 Apr 2026. Yet, the stock declined 1.98% on the day the cross formed, and the broader technical picture offers a nuanced view rather than a straightforward bullish confirmation. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Benares Hotels Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals and Micro-Cap Context
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Benares Hotels Ltd has crossed above its 200-day moving average, creating a golden cross on 13 Apr 2026. Yet, this technical milestone arrives amid a complex backdrop of mixed momentum indicators and the challenges typical of a micro-cap stock, raising questions about the signal’s reliability. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd Hits New 52-Week High of Rs 3680.7 on Back of Strong Technical Signals
item.description: From a 52-week low of Rs 1761.7 to a fresh peak of Rs 3680.7, Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd has more than doubled in value over the past year, showcasing remarkable price momentum despite a broader market pullback. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Sensex and Nifty Slip Amid Broad Market Weakness; Utilities Shine as Auto Sector Falters
item.description: Indian equity benchmarks closed lower on 13 Apr 2026, with the Sensex falling 702.68 points (-0.91%) to 76,847.57 and the Nifty ending at 23,842.65, down 207.95 points (-0.86%). Market breadth was weak as declines outpaced advances across sectors, led by losses in the auto and midcap segments, while utilities and power stocks bucked the trend with fresh 52-week highs. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Sees Broad Weakness as BSE Midcap 150 Declines 0.72%
item.description: The BSE Midcap 150 index experienced a modest decline of 0.72% on 13 Apr 2026, reflecting a cautious market mood amid mixed sectoral performances and a broad-based decline in stock breadth. Despite the overall downturn, select mid-cap stocks delivered notable returns, underscoring the segment's inherent volatility and selective opportunities for investors. Time: 2 hours ago
